scripts.contract:build: npx hardhat build contracts/CftToken.sol && npx hardhat build contracts/ContributorDistributor.sol && npx hardhat build contracts/RedemptionPool.sol
scripts.contract:deploy: npx hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/CFT.ts --network arbitrumOne --verify
scripts.contract:deploy:force: npx hardhat ignition wipe chain-42161 CftTokenModule#CFTToken --network arbitrumOne && npm run contract:deploy
scripts.contract:verify: npx hardhat ignition --network arbitrumOne verify chain-42161
